description: Run common npm commands in your project.
author: colorfulDots

commands.name: NPM Install
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "npm install"'
commands.description: Install all project dependencies from package.json

commands.name: NPM Run Build
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "npm run build"'
commands.description: Run the build script defined in package.json

commands.name: NPM Run Test
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "npm test"'
commands.description: Run the test suite defined in package.json

commands.name: NPM Run Dev
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "npm run dev"'

commands.name: NPM Outdated
commands.target: osascript -e 'tell app "Terminal" to do script "npm outdated"'
commands.description: List packages that have newer versions available
